subject: Swift triggers 1209631, 1209632, 1209635 and 1209644 are not interesting astrophysical events
body:
K. L. Page (U Leicester) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift triggers 1209631, 1209632, 1209635 and 1209644 (trigger times between
2024-01-19 11:57 and 13:19 UT) were caused by a star tracker
loss-of-lock event, and are not interesting astrophysical events.
